hero.title: The operating platform for cross-border commerce teams.
hero.description: Make every marketplace launch, logistics handoff, and compliance review easier to coordinate with one shared operating layer.

features.title: From listing to delivery, keep every market moving

catalog.title: Marketplace catalog control
catalog.description: Centralize listing requirements, product files, and channel-ready attributes for Amazon, Shopify, TikTok Shop, and wholesale buyers.

fulfillment.title: Fulfillment visibility
fulfillment.description: Track prep work, shipping documents, warehouse handoffs, and route readiness before goods leave the origin market.

compliance.title: Document review workflow
compliance.description: Collect certificates, audit files, licenses, and product sheets so operations teams can review risk before launch.

workflow.title: A cleaner path from supplier files to marketplace launch
workflow.description: Replace scattered spreadsheets and chat threads with a structured review process for stores, shipments, and product documents.

connect.title: Connect market context
connect.description: Capture channels, regions, product categories, and launch priorities in one structured intake.

prepare.title: Prepare document packages
prepare.description: Prepare licenses, product sheets, route notes, and compliance files inside the admin content workflow.

ship.title: Launch with fewer surprises
ship.description: Give operations teams the information they need to route, approve, and prioritize cross-border work.

materials.title: Operational playbooks from the back office
materials.description: These resources are published by the admin team and displayed on the public site. Buyers and operators can open each content page for details.
materials.empty: No published resources yet. Create and publish materials in the admin console.

form.title: Request a cross-border operations review
form.description: Anyone can submit a request. No portal password is required. Descriptions are checked against the admin-controlled sensitive word list.
form.name: Contact name
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell us about your sales channels, target markets, product category, fulfillment setup, and current blockers.

points.free: Open to sellers, agencies, suppliers, and logistics teams.
points.response: Admin reviewers can see every submission in the back office.
points.secure: Sensitive descriptions are blocked before entering the review queue.

items.question: Who can submit the front-page form?
items.answer: The form is open to all visitors. It only collects contact and business context, not a password.

items.question: Where do resource pages come from?
items.answer: Resource cards are created and published by administrators. Visitors can read them, but they do not upload materials from the public site.

items.question: Where do submissions go?
items.answer: Front-page inquiries are stored in the real database and displayed in the admin console.

items.question: How are sensitive descriptions handled?
items.answer: The description is checked against the active sensitive-word list before the request is accepted.

channels.label: Built for marketplace, logistics, and supplier teams

home.quote: “CargoPilot gives our operators one place to understand what is ready, what is blocked, and what needs to move before a launch date slips.”

specialties.title: Workflows designed for every trade lane.

platform.title: A commerce residency layer that keeps sellers, suppliers, and logistics teams aligned.

footer.description: The trusted AI infrastructure for building and deploying cross-border commerce workflows.

empty.title: No published resource selected
empty.description: Open a resource from the home page. Only materials published by the admin team can be viewed here.

points.platform: Clarify marketplace requirements before listing work begins.
points.fulfillment: Align warehouse, carrier, and document handoffs.
points.compliance: Keep risk notes visible for operators and reviewers.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Monitor inquiry intake, published resources, screening coverage, and admin activity from live database records.

users.title: User Management
users.description: Monitor and manage all registered platform users.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Review visitor sessions, IP geography, behavior events, and long-term R2 session replays.

materials.title: Content Materials
materials.description: Create and publish public resource pages shown on the storefront.

materialCategories.title: Material Categories
materialCategories.description: Manage the category options available when creating content materials.

socialPlatforms.title: Social Platforms
socialPlatforms.description: Configure OAuth, API, publishing, and upload settings for social platform integrations.

inquiries.title: Customer Inquiries
inquiries.description: Track public inquiry submissions and sensitive-word screening results.

sensitiveWords.title: Sensitive Words
sensitiveWords.description: Control blocked terms used to validate public inquiry descriptions.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage profile, security, and notification preferences.

sessions.title: Recent sessions
sessions.description: Search by session, visitor, IP, page, city, or country.

delete.title: Delete session
delete.description: This will delete the analytics session, timeline events, and persisted replay chunks.

replay.title: Session replay
replay.missingSnapshot: This replay is missing its initial page snapshot. New sessions will include it automatically.

login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Sign in to your {siteName} admin account to continue

metrics.totalInquiriesDescription: All public form submissions stored in the database.
metrics.publishedMaterialsDescription: {total} total material records across all statuses.
metrics.sensitiveHitsDescription: Submissions blocked or flagged by active sensitive words.
metrics.activeSensitiveWordsDescription: Terms currently used to screen public descriptions.
metrics.activeUsersDescription: Enabled users who can access the back office.

charts.countryDistributionDescription: Top countries captured from the inquiry geo lookup.
charts.materialStatusDescription: How content records are distributed by publishing status.
charts.sensitiveSeverityDescription: Active sensitive terms grouped by severity.

recent.title: Recent inquiries
recent.description: Latest public submissions with location and screening state.

empty.countries: No geo location data has been captured yet.
empty.inquiries: No inquiry submissions have been stored yet.

formErrors.tooBig: {field} must be no more than {max} characters.
formErrors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
formErrors.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid URL for {field}.
formErrors.unknown: Save failed. Please check the form and try again.

publish.title: Publish material
publish.description: This material is suitable for: {platforms}. Confirm publishing to these connected platforms?
publish.youtubeSkipped: YouTube is skipped because this material does not have a video attachment.
publish.noAccounts: No connected social accounts were found.
publish.noPlatformConfigs: No social platform configuration has been enabled.

editor.createPageDescription: Write a full public resource page with category, cover, Markdown content, and publishing status.
editor.editPageDescription: Update an existing public resource with Markdown content, assets, and publishing state.
editor.basicInfoDescription: These fields drive list display, detail-page summaries, and admin search.
editor.markdownContentDescription: Insert images, videos, and attachment links. The public detail page renders this Markdown.
editor.assetsDescription: The cover appears in listings and detail pages. Attachments can be stored as supporting files.

profile.emailDescription: Email cannot be changed. Contact support if needed.
profile.bioPlaceholder: Write a short description about yourself...

security.twoFactorEnabled: Your account is protected with a second verification step.
security.twoFactorDisabled: Require a code alongside your password when signing in.
security.scanDescription: Open Google Authenticator, Authy, or any TOTP-compatible app and scan the QR code.
security.manualKey: Can't scan? Enter this key manually
security.otpLabel: Enter the 6-digit code from your app

notifications.pushDescription: Browser and mobile push alert preferences.
notifications.loginAlertsDescription: Get notified whenever a new sign-in is detected on your account.
notifications.securityUpdatesDescription: Critical security announcements and important policy changes.
notifications.productUpdatesDescription: New features, improvements and release notes from the team.
notifications.realtimeAlertsDescription: Instant push notifications for critical system events.
notifications.weeklyDigestDescription: A curated weekly summary of activity in your account.

contact.title: Let us understand your cross-border operating model.
contact.description: Share your channels, regions, product categories, and current blockers. The admin team will review the request inside the back office.

errors.tooBig: {field} must be no more than {max} characters.
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid URL for {field}.
errors.sensitiveContent: The business description contains blocked content. Please revise it and submit again.
errors.unknown: Submission failed. Please check the form and try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Customize settings, email preferences, and web appearance.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Upload and manage your profile picture visible to other users.
profile.usernameDescription: Your unique username for identification across the platform.
profile.personalProfileDescription: Add a brief description about yourself to share with others.
profile.timezoneDescription: Select your timezone for accurate time display

security.passwordDescription: Update your password to keep your account secure.

privacy.dataExportDescription: Download a copy of all your personal data stored in our system.
privacy.dataExportBody: Request a copy of your data including profile information, settings, and activity history.
privacy.cookieDescription: Manage how we use cookies to improve your experience.
privacy.necessaryCookiesDescription: Required for the website to function properly
privacy.analyticsCookiesDescription: Help us understand how you use our site
privacy.deleteDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data.
privacy.deleteBody: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.
privacy.deletePointData: All your data will be permanently deleted
privacy.deletePointAccess: You will lose access to all services
privacy.deleteConfirm: Are you absolutely sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone and all your data will be permanently deleted.
